creator: microsoft.com

evidence.text: As part of Bridge, Bradesco’s intelligent agents support millions of users, dozens of projects, and billions of transactions daily. BIA for Customers supports personalized customer interactions for roughly 74 million customers. BIA Corporate provides fast, accurate answers to job-related questions, using Azure Cosmos DB for reliable access to current information. And Microsoft Azure Redis Cache enhances performance across Bradesco’s AI-powered services. The outcome: improved operational efficiency and decision-making.

title: Banco Bradesco streamlines customer service with Azure AI Foundry, apps, and databases | Microsoft Customer Stories
